summary: Virtual Classroom Module Batch 2 testing completed. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Fixed a bug in ClassroomPage.js where user role wasn't recognized due to incorrect API response parsing. Frontend classroom UI renders correctly with 75/25 split layout, LiveKit video integration, and teacher tools.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/ClassroomPage.js - Fixed user role parsing bug (line 200: meData.user || meData)
/app/backend/tests/test_classroom_batch2.py - New test file for Batch 2 features

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Landing page, Teacher dashboard, Classroom page all working)

seed_data_creation: Created test teacher with session, class booking, and class session for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Virtual Classroom Module Batch 2 complete. Tested: LiveKit token generation (POST /api/classroom/livekit/token), WebSocket sync (/api/classroom/ws/{room_id}), Recording toggle (POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/recording/toggle), and frontend ClassroomPage. All Batch 1 APIs still work (regression passed). Fixed a bug where ClassroomPage wasn't recognizing user.role from /api/auth/me response.

bugs_fixed.issue: User role not recognized - teacher toolbar and navigator not showing
bugs_fixed.root_cause: Code expected meData.user but /api/auth/me returns user object directly without wrapper

batch_2_apis.POST /api/classroom/livekit/token: Generates valid JWT with server_url, identity, name, is_teacher
batch_2_apis.WebSocket /api/classroom/ws/{room_id}: Connects and syncs ROOM_STATE, PAGE_CHANGE, POINTER_MOVE, HIGHLIGHT, NAVIGATE events
batch_2_apis.POST /api/classroom/session/{id}/recordi: Teacher can start/stop with visible=true, student forbidden (403)

ClassroomPage.digital_mushaf: Arabic text from api.quran.com rendering correctly
ClassroomPage.teacher_toolbar: Pointer, Highlighter, Page nav (1/604), Fullscreen toggle
ClassroomPage.control_bar: Mic, Camera, End Class buttons working

mocked_integrations.livekit_recording_egress: MOCKED (toggle broadcasts WS events but no actual S3/GCS upload)
